player.name: Lavitz Harcourt

studying.description: Broad habit of disciplined reading, close textual analysis, and patient symbolic interpretation.

etiquette_noble.description: Courtly manners, posture, titles, timing, and the thousand tiny rules nobles weaponize against each other.

political_reading.description: Reading the room beneath the room: alliances, hidden motives, leverage, and reputational danger.

draconic_self_control.description: Suppressing instinctive territoriality and involuntary draconic displays under pressure.

sleight_of_hands(sensual).description: Manual finesse and subtle hand control used in intimate or deliberately provocative situations.

prestidigitation.name: prestidigitation
prestidigitation.description: Minor arcane cantrip for harmless sensory tricks, cleaning, flavoring, and tiny magical flourishes.

mage_hand.name: mage hand
mage_hand.description: Summon a spectral hand to manipulate small objects at a distance.

charm_person.name: charm person
charm_person.description: Temporarily soften a humanoid's attitude and make them view you as a friendly acquaintance.

dragon_breath.name: dragon breath
dragon_breath.description: Imbue a creature with a short-lived breath weapon of elemental force.

command.name: command
command.description: Speak a magically compelling one-word order that can force immediate obedience.

suggestion.name: suggestion
suggestion.description: Plant a persuasive magical course of action in a target's mind for a longer span than simple charm.
suggestion.notes: A signature spell for courtly pressure and quiet manipulation.

Draconic Resilience.description: Inherited draconic vitality toughens body and presence beyond a normal noble upbringing.

Fae-Touched.description: A fae mark rests on your magic and instincts, making glamour and temptation feel strangely natural.

Noble Bearing.description: Training and bloodline make posture, diction, and social pressure difficult to ignore.

Heightened Senses.description: Awakening sharpens attention to emotional weather, hidden intent, and subtle sensory detail.

worn_items.notes: Gold band bearing the Harcourt crest. Proof of noble lineage; required for formal sealing of correspondence and legal documents. Currently worn on left ring finger.

Silver-gold filigree band worn near the base of the tail. Fae-crafted. Passive glamour effect: makes the tail appear slightly more controlled and elegant than it actually is. Mild warmth when touched. Currently worn.

Signet Ring of House Harcourt.description: Gold band bearing the Harcourt crest. Proof of noble lineage; required for formal sealing of correspondence and legal documents. Currently worn on left ring finger.

Faeforged Tail-Ring (silver-gold filigre.description: Silver-gold filigree band worn near the base of the tail. Fae-crafted. Passive glamour effect: makes the tail appear slightly more controlled and elegant than it actually is. Mild warmth when touched. Currently worn.

ceremonial dagger.description: Slim blade, hilt inlaid with dragonscale-pattern enamel in Harcourt crimson. Not a fighting weapon by training — a nobleman's sidearm worn at formal occasions. Sharp enough to matter.

wand of suggestion.description: Pale ash wood tipped with a sliver of dragon fang. Allows casting Suggestion without expending a spell slot once per long rest. Recharges at dawn.

spellbook.description: Dark leather cover stamped with draconic runes. Contains all known spells plus personal annotations, observations on magical theory, and a few pages of private writing.

formal court attire.description: Full House Harcourt court dress. Midnight blue and deep crimson. Tailored precisely. Worn only for formal House appearances, audiences, or political events.

silver grooming kit.description: Compact silver case: comb, small mirror, nail file, a tiny vial of hair oil. Used every morning without exception.

journal (leather-bound, half-filled).description: Personal journal. Half the entries are in cipher. Contains observations on people, political notes, and increasingly confused private reflections on the transformation.

vial of draconic musk perfume.description: Distilled from Lavitz's own developing pheromone output by House apothecary. Amplifies natural musk subtly. Used sparingly before social engagements.

potion of arousal.description: Amber vial, black-wax seal. One dose surges libido to ×3.0 and heightens sensitivity for 2–4 hours; two doses in succession sharpen the effect, making touch difficult to ignore.

health potion.description: A red restorative vial kept for emergencies.

player.notes: Sanitized bootstrap actor state for backend prototyping. Synced selected inventory, equipment, skills, item notes, and social state from uploaded project state.

physical.build: slender, beginning to fill toward athletic draconic-grace
physical.skin: pale with crimson-to-burgundy draconic scaling on shoulders, spine, hips, outer thighs
physical.tail: dracoic; strong, expressive, hard to control under emotion
physical.horns: short elegant ridges, beginning to curve
physical.voice: refined and measured, growing more resonant
physical.transformation_stage_label: Stage 1 (8-12 inches): Draconic Vitality, Noble Bearing, Heightened Senses, Pheromone Aura

cockring.notes: Faerie gift. Permanent attunement. Two rotations = 5min restore to true size. Single rotation = compression only, effects off.

heritage.father: dragonborn — bodily resilience, heat affinity, territorial awareness, command under pressure, draconic dream imagery
heritage.mother: tiefling — heightened sensory perception, sensitivity to hidden motives, glamour affinity, reading emotional weather

extra_state.social_status: Sole heir to House Harcourt, old and politically important noble house
extra_state.current_location: Academy — Entrance Hall, arriving from House Harcourt
journal: Used sleight_of_hands(sensual) to pinch maid's bottom in kitchen. Successfully done without making a scene.
Used sleight_of_hands(sensual) to pinch maid's bottom in kitchen. Successfully done without making a scene.
Used sleight_of_hands(sensual) to pinch maid's bottom in kitchen. Successfully done without making a scene.
Used sleight_of_hands(sensual) to pinch maid's bottom in kitchen. Successfully done without making a scene.
Pinched two maids' bottoms in kitchen, continuing to prepare refreshments while showing off
Called out to maids with suggestive comment, remaining naked while returning to Mother in study.
Used prestidigitation to add a flourish when placing the tray in front of Mother.
Used sleight_of_hands(sensual) to press Mother further about her reaction to encounter with maids.
Used etiquette_noble and persuasion to shift Mother's position on interactions with staff in favor of my goals, noting progress on 'Plant your seed' quest.
Used etiquette_noble and persuasion to gain insight into Mother's past experiences with servants, furthering 'Plant your seed' quest objectives.
Used formal court attire to prepare for Academy, noting readiness and current state of 'Plant your seed' quest progress.
Expressed interest in studying under Lady Frostwind and asked Mother how she plans to arrange such lessons.
Asked Mother about payment and magical skills for studying under Lady Frostwind. Suggested focusing on spells like suggestion and charm_person to aid in social interactions and alliances.
